title: Introduction To Internet Of Things - Week 3
subject: Introduction To Internet Of Things

questions.question: State whether the following statement is true or false. Statement: There is no network layer in Wired HART

Dumb behavior of sensor nodes is ________ in nature (as it is dependent on the effects of the environmental conditions).
The process of identifying channels consistently affected by interference and removing them from use is known as ________.

State true or false. NFC works on the principle of magnetic induction.
State whether the following statement is true or false. Statement: NFC tags found in supermarket products are examples of active NFC.
A ________ in NFC emits a small electric current which creates a magnetic field that in turn bridges the physical space between the devices.
State true or false. Bluetooth technology is based on Ad-hoc network technology
State true or false. Zwave utilizes GFSK modulation and Manchester channel encoding.
